x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Work permit volume reflects safety-critical activities requiring AI-assisted review and compliance checking. Now Assist can help permit approvers by summarizing requirements and flagging missing conditions before approval.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure work permits are being issued and managed through the HS module.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_5e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c3a
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Work permit volume reflects safety-critical activities requiring AI-assisted review and compliance checking. Now Assist can help permit approvers by summarizing requirements and flagging missing conditions before approval.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>HS Work Permit Volume</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_hs_rm_work_permit");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=20)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" permits",finding:c+" work permits found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" permits",finding:c+" work permits found."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"0 permits",finding:"No work permits found."};
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>HS</module>
<number>CHK0006166</number>
<order/>
<remediation_guidance>Ensure work permits are being issued and managed through the HS module.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>5e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c3a</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
